message:
fix(cass): rename CassSearchResults field from `matches` to `hits` with backward-compat alias

CASS v0.2.1 search JSON uses `hits` not `matches`, causing `ms build
--from-cass` to fail with "missing field matches" deserialization error.
Rename the struct field to `hits` and add `#[serde(alias = "matches")]`
so both old and new CASS output formats are accepted.

Fixes #64

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
